name: upsell

emails.subject_A: 🔥 How's the Starter Kit working out?
emails.subject_B: Quick check-in: Did you try the automations?
emails.body:
Hey {{first_name}}!

You downloaded the AI Automation Starter Kit yesterday. Nice!

**Quick question:** Did you try any of the automations yet?

Here's what most people start with:

1️⃣ **The 5-Minute Blog-to-Email Automation**
- Easiest to set up
- Immediate time savings
- Works with any blog platform

2️⃣ **The Social Media Auto-Poster**
- Publish once, distribute everywhere
- Saves 5-10 hours/week
- Set-and-forget system

3️⃣ **The Lead Magnet Delivery System**
- Captures emails automatically
- Sends welcome sequence
- Builds your list on autopilot

**Stuck on anything?** Hit reply. I'm here to help.

**Want More?**

The Starter Kit has 5 automations. The full Masterclass has 50+.

If you're ready to go deeper:

[Check Out the Full Masterclass]({{course_link}})

Keep building,
n0mad

emails.subject_A: ⚡ The One Automation That Changed Everything
emails.body:
{{first_name}},

You know what changed my business?

Not one big thing. One AUTOMATION.

**The Content Multiplication System:**

1. Write one blog post (1 hour)
2. AI extracts 10 social posts (2 minutes)
3. AI creates email newsletter (3 minutes)
4. AI generates video script (2 minutes)
5. Everything auto-publishes (0 minutes)

**Result:** 1 hour of work = 1 week of content.

That's not in the Starter Kit. It's in the Masterclass.

**Inside the Masterclass:**
- The Content Multiplication System (full tutorial)
- 50+ automation blueprints
- Copy-paste templates
- Private community
- Weekly live Q&A

**Plus:** If you enroll now, I'll personally set up your first automation for free.

[Enroll in the Masterclass]({{course_link}})

This is how you scale,
n0mad

P.S. The Starter Kit was the appetizer. This is the main course.

emails.subject_B: I calculated how much time you're losing
emails.body:
{{first_name}},

Let's do some math.

**Average solopreneur spends:**
- 10 hrs/week on content creation
- 8 hrs/week on email marketing
- 5 hrs/week on social media
- 5 hrs/week on admin tasks

**Total: 28 hours/week**

With automation, you can cut that by 70%.

**That's 20 hours/week saved.**

**What could you do with 20 extra hours?**
- Build a new product
- Learn a new skill
- Spend time with family
- Actually rest for once

**The Investment:**
- Masterclass: $97
- Time to implement: 5 hours
- Time saved per year: 1,040 hours

**ROI:** If your time is worth $25/hour, that's $26,000/year in value.

For $97.

**The Math Checks Out.**

[Stop Trading Time for Money]({{course_link}})

Let's build your freedom,
n0mad

P.S. Still not sure? Reply with your biggest time-waster. I'll send you a custom automation blueprint. Free.

{{first_name}},

Everyone says "work smarter, not harder."

But what does that actually mean?

**Hustle Culture Says:**
- Wake up at 4 AM
- Grind 16 hours/day
- Sleep is for the weak
- No pain, no gain

**Automation Culture Says:**
- Build systems that work while you sleep
- Leverage technology, not just effort
- Work 4 hours, earn the same as 16
- Time freedom > money

I tried both. Hustle culture almost killed me.

Automation culture saved me.

**Here's the truth:**

You can keep hustling. Keep grinding. Keep burning out.

Or you can build systems that do the work for you.

**The Masterclass teaches the second way.**

No fluff. No motivational BS. Just practical automations that save time and make money.

[Build Your Automation Empire]({{course_link}})

Or don't. Keep hustling. But in 6 months, don't wonder why you're still stuck.

Your move,
n0mad

P.S. This is my last email about the Masterclass. After this, you're on your own.

---

**One Last Thing:**

If you're not ready for the Masterclass, that's fine. But stay subscribed to this newsletter.

I'll keep sending free automation tutorials, case studies, and tips.

You'll learn a ton either way.

See you in your inbox,
n0mad
